match.name: 38th Match

gemma_observations: Pant is prioritizing rotation of strike over aggressive hitting.
Pant is rotating strike and building a platform for Markram.
Pant is rotating strike effectively, prioritizing singles and doubles.
Markram is consistently looking to attack Green and Roy.
Pant is rotating strike effectively, prioritizing scoring opportunities.
Rishabh Pant is aggressively attempting to accelerate the scoring rate.
